steps.title: Set up the calculation
steps.content: We need to find 20% of the total bill of 30.00 dollars.

steps.title: Calculate the tip amount
steps.content:
Convert 20% to a decimal: $20\% = 0.2$.
Multiply by the total bill:
$$0.2 \times 30 = 6$$
The tip is 6.00 dollars. That confirms D is correct.
